global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and predominantly white plumage. It features a light gray back, black wingtips, and a yellow bill with a red spot. The legs are pink, and the eyes are pale yellow with a red orbital ring.

part_details.plumage: Predominantly white with light gray back and black wingtips
part_details.bill: Yellow with a distinctive red spot near the tip
part_details.eyes: Pale yellow with a red orbital ring

spatial_relations: The light gray back transitions into black wingtips
The yellow bill is positioned at the front of the head
The pink legs are positioned under the body
